title: almana hirsuta
intro: Almana hirsuta, also known as hairy almanac or hairy alman, is a type of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Almana hirsuta include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Almana hirsuta include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
